zh.lifeSummary: 當Renaud de Clermont de Creil I於1010年出生在法國皮卡迪奧易波奧瓦斯時，他的父親Hugues De Creil et de Mouchy14歲，母親Marguerite de Ramerupt37歲。他於1029年與Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais在法國皮卡迪奧易可勒爾蒙特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1098年在他的家鄉享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Renaud de Clermont de Creil I于1010年出生在法国皮卡迪奧易波奧瓦斯时，他的父亲Hugues De Creil et de Mouchy14岁，母亲Marguerite de Ramerupt37岁。他于1029年与Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais在法国皮卡迪奧易可勒爾蒙特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1098年在他的家乡享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clermont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Georges, Normand, Pierre, Armand, Edouard, Gaston, Ghislaine, Gilles, Henri, Herve, Jean Francois.

French and English (Middlesex, of Norman and French Huguenot origin): habitational name from any of various places in France called (Le) Clermont, from Old French clair, cler ‘bright, clear’ + mont ‘hill’, i.e. a hill that could be seen a long way off. Compare Clairmont .

English (Middlesex, of Norman and possibly also Huguenot origin): variant of Claremont, from the Old French female personal name Claremonde, supposedly from ancient Germanic Claremunda, a hybrid compound of Latin clarus ‘famous’ + ancient Germanic mund ‘protection’.

variants.name: Clairmont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Aime, Antoine, Aurore, Fernand.
French: variant of Clermont and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Clairmont is very rare in France.
In some cases possibly also English: variant of Claremont or Clermont . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Creil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Dietrich, Frieda.
Scottish: habitational name from Crail in Fife.
Americanized form of German Krail: cognate of Krauel .

variants.name: Creal
meanings: Probably Scottish: variant of   Crail  .
Possibly also an Americanized form of German   Kriel   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Krauel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz.
German: from Middle High German kröwel, krewel ‘fork with hooked tines, claw’, applied as a nickname either for a brusque person or a peasant.

nameMeanings.name: Renaud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Germanic. See Reynold .

en.lifeSummary: When Renaud de Clermont de Creil I was born in 1010, in Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, France, his father, Hugues De Creil et de Mouchy, was 14 and his mother, Marguerite de Ramerupt, was 37. He married Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais in 1029, in Clermont, Oise, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1098, in his hometown, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Renaud de Clermont de Creil I est né en 1010, à Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Hugues De Creil et de Mouchy, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Ramerupt, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais en 1029, à Clermont, Oise, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1098, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Renaud de Clermont de Creil I 1010 in Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues De Creil et de Mouchy 14 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Ramerupt 37. Er hat 1029 in Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1098 im Alter von 88 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud de Clermont de Creil I è nato il nel 1010 nel Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues De Creil et de Mouchy, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Ramerupt, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais nel 1029, nel Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1098, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Renaud de Clermont de Creil Iが1010年にフランスピカーディオイゼビーウベイスで生まれた時，父Hugues De Creil et de Mouchyは14歳，母Marguerite de Rameruptは37歳であった。1029年にフランスピカーディオイゼクラーモントでErmengarde de clermont en beauvaisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1098年に故郷で88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Renaud de Clermont de Creil I(이)가 1010년 프랑스 피카디 이스 보바이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues De Creil et de Mouchy(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Ramerupt(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1029년 프랑스 피카디 이스 클레몽에서 Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1098년 그의 고향에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud de Clermont de Creil I nasceu em 1010, em Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Hugues De Creil et de Mouchy, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Ramerupt, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais em 1029, em Clermont, Oise, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1098, em sua cidade natal, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Renaud de Clermont de Creil I родился в 1010 г. в местности бовеи, оис, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues De Creil et de Mouchy было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Ramerupt, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais в 1029 г. в местности клирмонт, оис, пикарди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1098 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Renaud de Clermont de Creil I nació en 1010, en Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Hugues De Creil et de Mouchy, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Ramerupt, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais en 1029, en Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1098, en su pueblo, a la edad de 88 años.
